full_text:
Xiang Cun 向存
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiang Cun (向存). Went with Fu Jin to attack Huo Jun at Jiameng but was defeated and killed. Xiang Cun was affiliated with Liu Zhang. Xiang Cun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
